flavor: A mill grinds finer when its grain pile is next door.
Patients heal faster when the larder is across the courtyard.
Wind-driven sails reinforce the water mill's output.
Forge sparks feed the workshop's tooling.
Workshop prototypes scale cleanly into the factory line.
Students cycling through the stacks copy faster.
Reference shelves a door away cut research time.
Fresh-struck coin moves quickly through a busy market.
Merchants prefer banking where they shop.
The mint and the vault share a courier.
Any neighborhood with a fight circle has something to cheer for.
Soldiers requisition tools straight from the next-door forge.
